---
title: "STA240 — Advanced Statistical Methods"
description: "Interactive case studies covering mixed models, multinomial regression, and ordinal regression. Run live R code directly in the browser — no installation needed."
date: 2026-04-17
image: ../images/sta240.png
categories: [Mixed Models, Multinomial Regression, Ordinal Regression, WebR]
---

*Inspired by the course Advanced Statistical Methods at the Department of Statistics, Gothenburg University.*

[Open tool](https://johlobs.github.io/STA240-Advanced-Statistical-Methods-/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
